params.name: Origin of Species
params.source: Fungus Chest (0.01%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Super Species Chest (0.07%), Wish Box, Wishing (0.09%)
params.description:
On Nov 4, 1859, Darwin completed this book which laid the foundation for the theory of evolution. In Darwin's "On the Origin of Species," there are countless detailed examples with rigorous logical reasoning that demonstrates the theories of natural selection and survival of the fittest. This book fundamentally changed many of the inherent concepts in the biological world. [Main points] Theory of Evolution: Species are variable
Common ancestor: All living things come from a common ancestor …
